title: Neuro-Symbolic FOL Translation Evaluation Datasets: RuleTaker, FOLIO, CLUTRR
summary: This artifact provides three standardized datasets for evaluating neuro-symbolic FOL translation pipelines: (1) RuleTaker (50,000 examples) - near-propositional fragment with rule-based reasoning and entailment/not-entailment labels; (2) FOLIO (1,001 examples) - natural language premises with gold-standard FOL annotations for evaluating translation quality, with train/val/test splits; (3) CLUTRR (5,000 examples) - multi-hop kinship reasoning stories with relation queries. All datasets are standardized to the exp_sel_data_out.json schema with fields: input (string), output (string), and metadata_* fields (metadata_config, metadata_fol_gold, metadata_split, metadata_example_id). The data.py script loads raw JSON files from temp/datasets/, standardizes them to the required schema, and outputs full_data_out.json. Mini (9 examples, 3 per dataset) and preview (9 examples with truncated strings) versions are also generated for development. Validation against the exp_sel_data_out.json schema passes. Total: 56,001 examples across 3 datasets, serialized to 29.85 MB JSON.
